testcase.name: test_03_add_items_to_cart[data0-chromium]

failure.message: assert ('cart' in 'https://www.ebay.com/itm/186585062862?_skw=coffee+mug&itmmeta=01kptd4mz9rfkmxnchgre3j888&hash=item2b71561dce:g:4isaao...s0dkmcoqvoasupvsezssneccum3s9zdgmkjbtrciknhblkqprxbprjq5tds4kgycfnhbxa4dllevzhbn9ssc1psww%3d%3d%7ctkp%3ablbmujbqks22zw' 'https://www.ebay.com/itm/186585062862?_skw=coffee+mug&itmmeta=01kptd4mz9rfkmxnchgre3j888&hash=item2b71561dce:g:4isaao...s0dkmcoqvoasupvsezssneccum3s9zdgmkjbtrciknhblkqprxbprjq5tds4kgycfnhbxa4dllevzhbn9ssc1psww%3d%3d%7ctkp%3ablbmujbqks22zw' + where + and "donald trump 'i'm bulletproof' coffee mug | ebay" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001C5FE86B870>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001C5FE86B870> = "Donald testcase.name: test_04_assert_cart_total_not_exceeds[data0-chromium]

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("div[data-test-id='SUBTOTAL'] span.text-display-span") to be visible

testcase.failure:
self = <test_ebay_features.TestEbayCore object at 0x000001C5FBE3DA70> page = <Page url='https://www.ebay.com/splashui/captcha?ap=1&appName=orch&ru=https%3A%2F%2Fcart.ebay.com%2F&iid=78731feb-8c49-421a-a65f-37cf84b57982&iim=eMTQ3Lja&iia=zcIzNS4yWX&iiz=yhOMTMuOTg*XZE'> data = {'max_price': '30', 'min_price': '10', 'password': 'NemoxQ@1504', 'search_term': 'Coffee Mug', ...}
@pytest.mark.order(4) def test_04_assert_cart_total_not_exceeds(self, page, data): """4. assertCartTotalNotExceeds""" # Note: This test assumes an item was added in previous steps or adds one now home_page = HomePage(page) search_page = SearchResultsPage(page) item_page = ItemPage(page) cart_page = CartPage(page)
# Ensure there is something in the cart home_page.search_item(data["search_term"]) search_page.filter_by_price(data["min_price"], data["max_price"]) search_page.select_first_item() item_page.add_to_cart()
budget = float(data["max_price"]) > cart_page.assert_cart_total_not_exceeds(budget, 1)
tests\test_ebay_features.py:71: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ pages\cart_page.py:34: in assert_cart_total_not_exceeds raise e pages\cart_page.py:19: in assert_cart_total_not_exceeds self.cart_total.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000) .venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\sync_api\_generated.py:18074: in wait_for self._sync(self._impl_obj.wait_for(timeout=timeout, state=state)) .venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_locator.py:710: in wait_for await self._frame.wait_for_selector( .venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_frame.py:369: in wait_for_selector await self._channel.send( .venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <playwright._impl._connection.Connection object at 0x000001C5FE1E2900> cb = <function Channel.send.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x000001C5FC197480> is_internal = False, title = None
async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0)
parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal, title) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for locator("div[data-test-id='SUBTOTAL'] span.text-display-span") to be visible
.venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:559: TimeoutError
